text.title: Methodologies Detail Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Methodologies Detail methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: extract-source
step.action: Pull frontmatter + body sections + rules + schema + examples + tree.

step.name: render-canonical
step.action: Emit sections in canonical order using the template.

step.name: audit-pass
step.action: Run audit checklist (12 binary checks); reject if any fail.
step.decision-gate: If audit fails, return to extract-source; never publish.
